form.formComment: Nearing another win after his success on March 24 at Warragul over 400m. Last start was third over 390m in 22.24, behind Blackpool Iris. Close to the speed and boxed on well at the latest run. Key chance again.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, filling the minors at his last four starts, the latest when third (22.40) at this track. Drawn close to the inside. Top-three aspirations.

form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at Ballarat when a 3.5 lengths second but did clock a slick 22.21 over the 390m trip. Rates on top here on the time from last run.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (22.62) when seventh over 390m at this track in a Grade 5. Has three wins and four placings from 12 starts from the draw. Can hit the frame with the right run.
